/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -std=c++11 -O2 -Wall -Wno-comment -Wno-return-type -Wno-switch -Wno-missing-noreturn -Wno-unused-function -Wno-ignored-attributes -pedantic -ggdb -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsubprocess.so -o libsubprocess.so CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/CowData.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/PipeVar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/ProcessBuilder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/ProcessBuilder_posix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/ProcessBuilder_windows.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/environ.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/pipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/shell_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/subprocess.dir/subprocess/utf8_to_utf16.cpp.o  -lstdc++fs -ldl
